creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sat May  3 08:48:51 2014
New Revision: 352894
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352894
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352894/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Use single space after WWW:
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, sort *_DEPENDS
  
  PR:		ports/189262
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/net/p5-Amazon-SQS-Simple/Makefile
  head/net/p5-Amazon-SQS-Simple/pkg-descr

Modified: head/net/p5-Amazon-SQS-Simple/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/p5-Amazon-SQS-Simple/Makefile	Sat May  3 08:48:46 2014	(r352893)
+++ head/net/p5-Amazon-SQS-Simple/Makefile	Sat May  3 08:48:51 2014	(r352894)
@@ -8,12 +8,15 @@ MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	CPAN:SWHITAKER
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	OO API for accessing the Amazon Simple Queue Service
 
-BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-XML-Simple>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-Simple \
-		p5-Digest-HMAC>=0:${PORTSDIR}/security/p5-Digest-HMAC \
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Digest-HMAC>=0:${PORTSDIR}/security/p5-Digest-HMAC \
 		p5-URI>=0:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-URI \
+		p5-XML-Simple>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-Simple \
 		p5-libwww>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-libwww
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 

Modified: head/net/p5-Amazon-SQS-Simple/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/net/p5-Amazon-SQS-Simple/pkg-descr	Sat May  3 08:48:46 2014	(r352893)
+++ head/net/p5-Amazon-SQS-Simple/pkg-descr	Sat May  3 08:48:51 2014	(r352894)
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 This module provides a Perlish interface to Amazon SQS.
 
-WWW:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/Amazon-SQS-Simple/
+WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Amazon-SQS-Simple/
